title: 7-Day Keto Meal Plan (A Full Week of Done-for-You Meals)
description: Your whole week of keto, sorted. This 7-day keto meal plan maps out breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a smart snack for every day — all low in net carbs and built to keep you full, not hungry. Perfect for beginners or anyone tired of deciding what to eat. Save this for meal-prep day and tap through for the full printable plan.
altText: A 7-day keto meal plan infographic with a grid of food photos for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks across the week, plus keto tips at the bottom.
